_comment: Canonical, ordered lists shared between .github/workflows/ci.yml and scripts/local-ci/entrypoint.sh so the two stop hand-drifting (a change to one used to have nothing keeping the other in sync). entrypoint.sh reads this file directly and loops over it; founder-os/tests/run-ci-drift-tests.js asserts ci.yml's steps/config still match it exactly. validateJsonFiles and shellcheckDir are read at runtime by both ci.yml's single-shell-block steps and entrypoint.sh, so those two can't drift at all (single source of truth); policyTestsScripts can't do the same trick since ci.yml keeps its own explicit per-script steps for readable, individually-attributed GitHub Actions UI output -- that one is drift-checked instead of unified.
